_comment: Mandatory-update floor for MinPin. The app's MinimumVersionGuard fetches this on launch. To force everyone below build N to update before continuing, set minimumBuild to N (the CFBundleVersion you require). Leave minimumBuild at 0 to disable the kill switch — it's intended for emergencies (API cutover, security recall), not regular releases.
reason: This version of MinPin is below the supported floor.
